title: Silentnight Air Bed Single with Built in Pump - High Rise Flocked Non Slip Electric Airbed Comfortable Full Body Support Air Mattress for Guests, Camping, Caravans - Grey – Single
features: COMFORTABLE SUPPORT: The Silentnight Extra High Flocked Airbed is supportive and comfortable. The beam construction offers full body support so that you can experience the comfort of home in the great outdoors, from the UK's most trusted sleep brand.
BUILT-IN ELECTRIC PUMP: Fast inflation in minutes with the convenient integral built-in electric pump.

COSY COMFORT: The airbed is soft to touch with a flocked top for a cosy night's sleep under the stars. The flocked layer is not only super cosy but helps to prevent the sleeping bag from slipping around the airbed so no sheet is needed!
MULTI-USE: Perfect for every occasion, the Silentnight airbed is perfect for every snooze, from camping trips to sleepovers at home. Simply fold away into the handy storage bag after each adventure!
BUILT TO LAST: Designed with a thick, hard wearing material for long lasting comfort. Free puncture kit included.
description: Product Description Enjoy the comfort of home in the great outdoors from Silentnight, the UK's most trusted sleep brand. The Silentnight Extra High Flocked Airbed with Built-in Electric Pump is from the UK's most trusted bed brand so you can bring the comfort of home to the great outdoors. The airbed is soft to touch with a flocked top layer and features a super supportive beam construction. For extra convenience, the airbed also features an integral electric pump for inflation in just minutes and a free handy storage bag. Silentnight are the UK's most trusted sleep brand with over 70 years' experience in creating products that offer solutions for every sleeper. Safety Warning Do not exceed the weight limit of 100 kilograms. Use the provided puncture kit to avoid punctures. Ensure proper inflation and deflation to avoid damage or injury. Use the airbed properly to avoid suffocation risks.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Perfect for Guests, Sleepovers and Camping, Built-In Pump, Puncture kit included, Flocked layer prevent the sleeping bag from slipping around the airbed, Extra Deep 37cm
